chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 97 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 04.03.2026 Mr. Saleem Raza, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2019 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution ever since. On 20.01.2025, following order was passed: “20.01.2025 Mr. Jahanzeb holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, Advocate for Applicant. Weeks’ time allowed for compliance; failing which this Reference Application shall stand dismiss without further orders.” Today once again brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of applicant’s learned counsel. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
